title: Verify that the tool accepts the model directory via -m and --model arguments.
Verify that the tool reports an error to stderr and exits non-zero for invalid model paths.
Verify that --agent-instructions prints the LLM prompt and exits 0 without requiring -m.
Verify that all element types defined in §2 are recognised and processed without E005.

scenarios.name: all defined element types are recognised without E005

title: Verify that an unrecognised type: value produces exactly one E005 finding.

scenarios.name: completely unknown type value produces E005

title: Verify that implicit base library supertypes are applied when no supertype: is given.

scenarios.name: PartDef with no supertype: loads without E004

title: Verify that Requirement elements are validated against the REQ-* id pattern.

scenarios.name: valid REQ-* id patterns are accepted
invalid REQ-* id pattern produces E006

title: Verify that TestCase elements are validated against the TC-* id pattern.

scenarios.name: valid TC-* id pattern is accepted
invalid TC-* id pattern produces E006

title: Verify that ADR elements are validated against the ADR-* id pattern.

scenarios.name: ADR id not matching pattern produces E300

title: Verify that duplicate id: values across elements produce E101.

scenarios.name: two elements with the same id produce E101

title: Verify that the tool writes its validation report to stdout in Markdown format.

scenarios.name: report is written to stdout in Markdown format

title: Verify that each finding in the report contains severity, code, element reference, and description.

scenarios.name: findings table has Code, File, and Message columns

title: Verify that the report includes a summary section with error and warning counts.

scenarios.name: summary section includes error and warning counts

title: Verify that the tool exits non-zero when any Error-severity finding is present.

scenarios.name: model with errors and warnings still exits non-zero

title: Verify that the tool exits with code 0 when no Error findings are present.
Verify that the tool accepts a model root directory path and uses it as the namespace root.
Verify that the tool recursively discovers .md files in nested subdirectories.

scenarios.name: elements in nested directories are discovered

title: Verify that standard build and tool directories are excluded from discovery.

scenarios.name: target/ directory is excluded from discovery

title: Verify that .sysmlignore patterns suppress file discovery.
Verify that _index.md is treated as the package declaration for its directory.
Verify that a file with unparseable frontmatter produces a warning but does not halt processing.

scenarios.name: malformed YAML frontmatter produces a warning, not a fatal error

title: Verify that frontmatter is recognized only when the opening --- is the first line.

scenarios.name: file with --- on first line is parsed correctly
file with blank first line produces E001 (missing frontmatter)

title: Verify that invalid YAML frontmatter produces error E002.

scenarios.name: valid YAML frontmatter produces no E002

title: Verify that a file without a type: field is skipped with a warning.

scenarios.name: file with no type: field is skipped with a warning
file with type: present is processed normally

title: Verify that qualified names are derived correctly from directory path and filename stem.

scenarios.name: single-level element has single-segment qualified name
three-level nested element has three-segment qualified name

title: Verify that the name: field in _index.md overrides the directory name in qualified names.

scenarios.name: name: in _index.md replaces directory name in qualified names

title: Verify that the name: field in element frontmatter overrides the filename stem.

scenarios.name: name: in frontmatter replaces the filename stem

title: Verify that _index.md contributes no name segment to its package or sibling elements.
Verify that computed reverse indices are populated from downstream link fields.
Verify that E310 is emitted when derivedFrom: is present but breakdownAdr: is absent.

scenarios.name: derivedFrom with no breakdownAdr produces E310
derivedFrom with valid breakdownAdr produces no E310

title: Verify that W303 is emitted when a breakdownAdr: references a proposed ADR on an approved requirement.

scenarios.name: approved requirement with proposed ADR produces W303

title: Verify that W300 is emitted for an approved leaf Requirement with no satisfying element.

scenarios.name: approved leaf requirement with no satisfies produces W300
approved leaf requirement with satisfies produces no W300

title: Verify that E312 is emitted when a parent Requirement appears in a satisfies: list.

scenarios.name: architecture element satisfying a parent requirement produces E312

title: Verify that E313 is emitted for incompatible domain/reqDomain in satisfies: links.

scenarios.name: software element satisfying hardware requirement produces E313
software element satisfying system requirement produces no E313

title: Verify that E315 is emitted for cross-domain supertype: or typedBy: links.

scenarios.name: software PartDef with hardware supertype produces E315

title: Verify that E314 is emitted for a deployment package with no hardware Allocation.

scenarios.name: deployment package with no hardware allocation produces E314
deployment package with hardware allocation produces no E314

title: Verify that each parse-time error rule is triggered by the corresponding malformed input.
Verify that each model-time error rule is triggered by its cross-element condition.
Verify that each warning rule is triggered by its condition with Warning severity.
Verify that integrity-level propagation errors E841-E843 and W808 are enforced.

scenarios.name: E842: derivedFrom element missing integrity level
E843: satisfies element missing integrity level
W808: integrity level lower than source without breakdownAdr

title: Verify that each finding includes the required fields: rule code, element reference, and description.

scenarios.name: findings include rule code, element reference, and description
parse-time error is attributed to source file

title: Verify that E-code findings are marked Error and W-code findings are marked Warning.

scenarios.name: E-code findings are under Errors section
W-code findings are under Warnings section

title: Verify that Error and Warning severity are reported consistently in the output.

scenarios.name: Errors section does not contain W-codes
Warnings section does not contain E-codes

title: Verify that absolute qualified names are resolved correctly from the model root.

scenarios.name: absolute reference to non-existent element produces an error

title: Verify that relative references are resolved outward from the current package.

scenarios.name: sibling reference resolves within the same package

title: Verify that an unresolved cross-reference produces an error but does not abort processing.

scenarios.name: dangling reference produces an error without crashing

title: Verify that circular supertype chains are detected and reported without crashing.

scenarios.name: two-element supertype cycle is detected without crashing

title: Verify that verifies: and derivedFrom: references are resolved by stable id:.

scenarios.name: verifies: resolves by stable id: regardless of file path
